name: Shred! 2 - ft Sam Pilgrim
short_description: Ride as Mountain Bike legend Sam Pilgrim, and use the advanced trick system to bust out insane combos in over 40 hand crafted levels. Created out of passion for the sport by a solo developer, Shred! 2 is the most authentic MTB gaming experience available!
detailed_description:
Ride as world champion and MTB legend Sam Pilgrim, using an advanced trick system to bust out insane combos across 40+ hand-crafted levels designed to capture the “flow” of mountain biking.

With zero BS getting between you and the action, Shred! 2 can be a quick “one more go” session or a deep dive into longer shredding runs. It’s an addictive, authentic MTB experience where every inch of trail pushes you to the limit.

Created out of pure passion for the sport by a solo developer, Shred! 2 delivers one of the most genuine MTB gameplay experiences out there.

Ride & Customise bikes...lots of Bikes!

Ride official Canyon bikes, including the Stitched 360, Stitched 720, Spectral, Torque, and Sender! Plus unlock a whole range of custom creations—from clean modern builds to full-on ridiculous contraptions. Ever wanted to launch a mini bike off a cliff? Or tailwhip a tandem? Now you can. Sam the man would be proud.

Over 40 levels & 200 unique challenges

Take on 40 hand-crafted levels spanning diverse MTB disciplines, including Downhill, Slopestyle, and Street riding inspired by MTB culture, riding destinations, events and video segments!

Ride across the UK, USA, the High Alps, and “The Zone” — a blatant excuse to push physics and level design to the absolute limit, where even gravity is occasionally optional!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
